nl_query: Which scripts have been through more than one evaluation cycle and have at least one result history correction, showing the script URN, number of cycles, number of corrections, and the latest final marks.
failed_sql:
SELECT r.script_id, r.urn, COUNT(DISTINCT b.id) AS cycles, COUNT(DISTINCT rh.id) AS corrections, MAX(r.final_marks) AS latest_final_marks
FROM   result r
JOIN   board b ON r.board_id = b.id
JOIN   result_history rh ON r.id = rh.result_id
WHERE  rh.id IN (
  SELECT rh2.id
  FROM   result_history rh2
  JOIN   board b2 ON rh2.board_id = b2.id
  WHERE  b2.id > b.id
)
GROUP  BY r.script_id, r.urn
HAVING COUNT(DISTINCT rh.id) > 1
ORDER  BY cycles DESC, latest_final_marks DESC
LIMIT  200;
error: Validation failed (schema): Hallucinated column(s): result.urn, result.urn, result_history.board_id. Use only columns that exist in the schema.
